fields.label: Search Query
fields.help: The search keyword used by the selected engine. Example: pizza.

fields.label: Device Type
fields.help: Defines the device type used to render or fetch search results.

fields.label: UULE
fields.help: Used with Google precise location targeting.

fields.label: Google Domain
fields.help: Defines the Google domain used for the request. Example: google.com.

fields.label: Country/Region
fields.help: Targets results by country or region. Example: us.

options.label: Congo, the Democratic Republic of the
Macedonia, the Former Yugosalv Republic of
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

fields.label: Language
fields.help: Sets the interface language for returned results. Example: en.

options.label: Congo, the Democratic Republic of the
Macedonia, the Former Yugosalv Republic of
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

fields.label: Start Position
fields.help: Sets the starting offset for paginated results.

fields.label: Results Per Page
fields.help: Sets the number of results requested per page.

fields.label: Render JS
fields.help: Controls whether the upstream page should execute JavaScript before returning results.

fields.label: AI Overview
fields.help: Controls whether AI overview data is included when the selected engine supports it.

fields.label: No Cache
fields.help: When enabled, the adapter returns a fresh preview result.
